title: Review CCP-16 implementations against spec/02 section 3.5 and spec/02a
description: Spec section 3.5 now points to spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md for CCP-16 (TDMA, load balancing, multi-channel). Review all implementations for conformance. Check: metrics match spec tables, thresholds correct, signaling formats match CBOR structures, test vectors pass.
